subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been revealed by the All-Merciful unto him who hath hearkened unto the Call and turned towards God, the Lord of the mighty Throne. He, verily, is among those who have attained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن سمع الندآء و اقبل الی الله رب العرش العظیم انه ممن فاز
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
